mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.title, c.content, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.real_start_date, c.real_end_date, c.state, c.create_at, u.user_name FROM challenge c INNER JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.visibility = 'PUBLIC' AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO challenge (user_id, title, content, start_date, end_date, visibility) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{visibility})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.title, c.content, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.real_start_date, c.real_end_date, c.visibility, c.is_deleted, c.state, c.create_at, u.id AS u_id, u.user_name AS u_user_name FROM challenge c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE challenge SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, visibility = #{visibility} WHERE id = #{id}
